designNotes.skillBaseline: Chaos curse, 0.3 SPR, 6s CD. Applies Hexed debuff (-20% target damage dealt, 5s) AND creates Hexed combo state (5s) for Soul Harvest to consume. Low direct damage, high utility.

buildIdentities.plague_doctor: Hex as a stacking, spreading curse — applies bleeding/poison alongside, multi-target. Hex becomes a debuff platform.
buildIdentities.spirit_caller: Hex empowers minions — Hexed targets become high-priority for the pack. Minions get ASPD/damage off curses.
buildIdentities.voodoo_master: Hex as setup for Soul Harvest 2x consume + Mass Sacrifice's hexed-consume bonus. Pure multiplicative payoff.

designNotes.noNewProcEffectsRequired: Reuses castSkill/createComboState/summonMinion patterns from Haunt/Locust JSONs.

branches.theme: Hex spreads disease alongside the curse — every Hexed target rots from within.

nodes.name: Curse Potency
nodes.description: +15/30% Hex potency (improves the −% target damage dealt effect from −20% to −23/26%).
engineFields: hexPotency (NEW — numeric; staff.ts postCast for staff_hex multiplies hexed debuff effect by 1 + value/100)

nodes.name: Cursed Spread
nodes.description: On Hex cast: 25/50% chance to also apply Hex to an adjacent pack enemy.
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); rawBehaviors.hexAdjacentSpread (NEW — staff.ts proc handler picks N adjacent non-hexed enemies, applies Hex)

nodes.name: Pestilent Curse
nodes.description: Hexed enemies receive 1 stack of Bleeding (3s) every second from the curse.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.hexAppliesBleedingPerSecond (NEW — tick.ts maintenance: per-second tick on hexed debuffs, apply bleeding stack)

nodes.name: Lingering Curse
nodes.description: +20/40% Hex duration.
engineFields: hexDuration (NEW — numeric; staff.ts postCast multiplies hexed debuff duration by 1 + value/100)

nodes.name: Plague Synergy
nodes.description: +15/30% Hex damage and potency on targets with 2+ debuffs.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileTargetAilmentCount (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Crit Curse
nodes.description: Hex critical strikes apply 2/3 stacks of Poisoned (4s).
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Chaos Mastery
nodes.description: +10/20% chaos penetration.
engineFields: chaosPenetration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Plague Mark
nodes.description: When a Hexed enemy dies, spread Hex to ALL pack members (full snapshot, half duration).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.hexedDeathSpreadsHex (NEW — tick.ts death loop: if killed enemy had hexed debuff, apply Hex to every alive pack member with snapshot * 1.0 and duration * percent/100)

nodes.name: DoT Support
nodes.description: +15/30% damage to DoT-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Mass Hex
nodes.description: Hex applies to entire pack on cast at 50% potency.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.hexPackOnCastPotency (NEW — staff.ts postCast: apply Hex to all pack enemies with hexedDebuffEffect * percent/100)

nodes.name: Eternal Curse
nodes.description: Hex duration is doubled. Cost: Hex CD +50%.
engineFields: hexDuration (NEW); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Decay Mark
nodes.description: Hexed targets accumulate +1% damage taken per second from all sources (caps at +30%).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.hexedDecayMark (NEW — tick.ts maintenance: per-second tick on hexed debuffs, increment a damageAmp counter on the debuff instance up to maxPercent; tick.ts damage application reads counter and multiplies incoming damage)

nodes.name: THE WITCHING HOUR
nodes.description: All enemies in the zone are permanently Hexed (no need to recast). Cost: −50% Hex direct damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.witchingHour (NEW — tick.ts maintenance: apply hexed debuff to all alive enemies every tick if missing, no duration); incDamage (EXISTS)

branches.theme: Hex empowers the dead. Cursed enemies become marked targets for your spirits.

nodes.name: Curse Reach
nodes.description: Hex initial cast also applies to 1/2 random adjacent enemies at full potency.
engineFields: hexSpreadRadius (NEW — numeric; staff.ts postCast applies Hex to N additional pack enemies with full snapshot)

nodes.name: Spirit Bind
nodes.description: On Hex cast: minions gain +30/60% damage for 5s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.hexCastBuffsMinions (NEW — staff.ts postCast: set per-minion damageMultBuff with expiry; staff.ts minion attack hook reads it)

nodes.name: Pack Curse
nodes.description: Your minions deal +50% damage to Hexed targets.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.minionBonusDamageVsHexed (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: if target has hexed debuff, multiply minion damage by 1 + value/100)

nodes.name: Bound Power
nodes.description: +10/20% Hex damage and potency while any minion is alive.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileMinionsAlive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pack Hunter
nodes.description: +20/40% Hex potency while 2+ minions alive.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileMinionsAlive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Hex Echo
nodes.description: On Hexed enemy kill: 25/50% chance to spawn a 3s spirit minion.
engineFields: procs[onKill] (EXISTS); summonMinion (NEW); conditionParam.targetHadDebuff (NEW)

nodes.name: Spectral Mastery
nodes.description: +10/20% chaos penetration.
engineFields: chaosPenetration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Resist Shred
nodes.description: Each minion attack on a Hexed target also reduces target's all-resist by 10% for 4s (stacks up to 5 times).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.minionHexedResistShred (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: if target hexed, apply/refresh resistShred debuff stack)

nodes.name: Minion Mastery Support
nodes.description: +15/30% minion damage.
engineFields: minionDamageMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Spirit Mark
nodes.description: Each Haunted+Hexed enemy in the pack grants +10% damage to all your minions.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritMarkBonus (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: count pack enemies that have BOTH haunted and hexed, apply +percent per enemy to minion damageMult)

nodes.name: Ghostly Curse
nodes.description: While any minion is alive, you have +30% cast speed against Hexed targets. Cost: −25% Hex potency.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.ghostlyCurseCastSpeed (NEW — tick.ts pre-roll for any cast: if conditions met, multiply castSpeed by 1 + amount/100); hexPotency (NEW)

nodes.name: Death's Mark
nodes.description: Minion kills on Hexed targets summon a 3s spirit minion (max 1 per second).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.minionHexedKillSummonsSpirit (NEW — tick.ts death loop: if killed enemy had hexed AND killer was a minion, with internal CD throttle, summon spirit_temp)

nodes.name: BINDER OF SOULS
nodes.description: All your minions deal cold damage and inherit your Hex potency as bonus damage. Cost: −30% minion HP.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.minionsBecomeColdInheritHexPotency (NEW — staff.ts summonMinions sets element='cold'; staff.ts minion attack hook adds hexPotency as % bonus damage); minionHpMult (EXISTS, negative)

branches.theme: Hex's only purpose is to be consumed. Make every consume a screen-clearing nuke.

nodes.name: Hex Mastery
nodes.description: +15/30% damage you deal to Hexed targets (all skills).
engineFields: hexedTargetDamageAmp (EXISTS in ResolvedSkillModifier; verify wired in tick.ts damage app)

nodes.name: Soul Curse
nodes.description: On Hex cast: 50/100% chance to generate 1 soul_stack.
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); createComboState (NEW)

nodes.name: Empowered Hex
nodes.description: When Soul Harvest consumes Hexed, the cast deals an additional +50% damage on top of its 2× consume bonus.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestHexedConsumeBonus (NEW — staff.ts preRoll for staff_soul_harvest when consuming hexed: multiplicative bonus +value/100)

nodes.name: Soul Bond
nodes.description: +5/10% Hex damage per active soul_stack.
engineFields: damagePerSoulStackActive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Soul Synergy
nodes.description: +20/40% Hex damage and potency while you have 3+ soul_stacks.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileBuffActive (EXISTS); threshold check requires soul_stack stacks >= threshold

nodes.name: Hex Catalyst
nodes.description: On Hex cast: 35/70% chance to immediately reset Soul Harvest cooldown.
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); cooldownReset[] (EXISTS in SkillProcEffect)

nodes.name: Ritual Mastery
nodes.description: −15/30% Hex cooldown.
engineFields: cooldownReduction (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Vexing Resonance
nodes.description: Each consecutive Hex cast on the same target stacks Vexing (+10% damage taken from all sources, max 5, 8s, resets on target switch).
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); conditionParam.sameTarget+resetOnTargetSwitch (EXISTS+NEW); DEBUFF_DEFS.vexing (NEW — applies +damageTaken% per stack; staff.ts onCast roll applies stack)

nodes.name: Curse Support
nodes.description: +20/40% damage to Curse-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Hexlord
nodes.description: Hex potency is doubled. Cost: Hex CD +2s.
engineFields: hexPotency (NEW); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Burst Master
nodes.description: Soul Harvest's hexed-consume bonus becomes 3× damage (up from 2×). Cost: −30% Hex direct damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulHarvestHexedConsumeMult (NEW — staff.ts preRoll for staff_soul_harvest when consuming hexed: override base 2× multiplier); incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Final Strike
nodes.description: Hex critical strikes guarantee that the next Soul Harvest cast within 5s also crits.
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS); BUFF_DEFS.soulHarvestNextCrit (NEW — flag buff; staff.ts preRoll for staff_soul_harvest checks it, forces crit and consumes)

nodes.name: THE PUPPETEER
nodes.description: On Hex cast: target takes 1% max HP damage per soul_stack you currently have. Cost: Hex no longer reduces target damage dealt (loses its baseline debuff effect).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.puppeteerHexCastDamage (NEW — staff.ts postCast for staff_hex: emit damage event to target = target.maxHp * perSoulStackPercent/100 * activeSoulStackCount); rawBehaviors.puppeteerDisablesHexDebuff (NEW — skip applying hexed debuff effect when set)
